mapper.select: SELECT TREE_CD AS id, COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') AS parent, TREE_NM AS text, COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, TREE_CD) AS functionCd, CAST(TREE_DEPTH AS VARCHAR) AS "level", 'group' AS type, COALESCE(SORT_ORDER, 0) AS sort, COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') AS useYn FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE WHERE COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(TREE_DEPTH, 0) = 1 ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, TREE_NM

SELECT TREE_CD AS id, COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') AS parent, TREE_NM AS text, COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, TREE_CD) AS functionCd, CAST(TREE_DEPTH AS VARCHAR) AS "level", 'group' AS type, COALESCE(SORT_ORDER, 0) AS sort, COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') AS useYn FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE WHERE COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND UPPER_TREE_CD = #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, TREE_NM

SELECT TREE_CD AS id, COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') AS parent, TREE_NM AS text, COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, TREE_CD) AS functionCd, CAST(TREE_DEPTH AS VARCHAR) AS "level", 'item' AS type, COALESCE(SORT_ORDER, 0) AS sort, COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') AS useYn FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE WHERE COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND UPPER_TREE_CD = #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, TREE_NM

SELECT DISTINCT ON (u.id) u.id, u.parent, u.text, u.functionCd, u."level", u.type, u.sort, u.useYn FROM ( SELECT TREE_CD AS id, COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') AS parent, TREE_NM AS text, COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, TREE_CD) AS functionCd, CAST(TREE_DEPTH AS VARCHAR) AS "level", 'group' AS type, COALESCE(SORT_ORDER, 0) AS sort, COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') AS useYn FROM DOCS_SW_TREE WHERE COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(TREE_DEPTH, 0) = 1 AND COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '') = 'ROOT' UNION ALL SELECT TREE_CD AS id, COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') AS parent, TREE_NM AS text, COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, TREE_CD) AS functionCd, CAST(TREE_DEPTH AS VARCHAR) AS "level", 'group' AS type, COALESCE(SORT_ORDER, 0) AS sort, COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') AS useYn FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE WHERE COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(TREE_DEPTH, 0) = 1 AND COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '') = 'ROOT' UNION ALL SELECT TREE_CD AS id, COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') AS parent, TREE_NM AS text, COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, TREE_CD) AS functionCd, CAST(TREE_DEPTH AS VARCHAR) AS "level", 'group' AS type, COALESCE(SORT_ORDER, 0) AS sort, COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') AS useYn FROM DOCS_DXF_TREE WHERE COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(TREE_DEPTH, 0) = 1 AND COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '') = 'ROOT' ) u ORDER BY u.id, u.sort, u.text

SELECT TREE_CD AS id, COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') AS parent, TREE_NM AS text, COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, TREE_CD) AS functionCd, CAST(TREE_DEPTH AS VARCHAR) AS "level", 'group' AS type, COALESCE(SORT_ORDER, 0) AS sort, COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') AS useYn FROM DOCS_SW_TREE WHERE COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND UPPER_TREE_CD = #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, TREE_NM

SELECT TREE_CD AS id, COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') AS parent, TREE_NM AS text, COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, TREE_CD) AS functionCd, CAST(TREE_DEPTH AS VARCHAR) AS "level", 'item' AS type, COALESCE(SORT_ORDER, 0) AS sort, COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') AS useYn FROM DOCS_SW_TREE WHERE COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND UPPER_TREE_CD = #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, TREE_NM
mapper.update: INSERT INTO DOCS_DRAWING_TREE (TREE_CD, FUNCTION_CD, UPPER_TREE_CD, TREE_NM, TREE_DEPTH, SORT_ORDER, TREE_PATH, USE_YN) SELECT #{treeCd}, #{functionCd}, CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL AND #{functionCd} LIKE 'FC%' THEN 'ROOT' ELSE #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} END, #{treeNm}, CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT COALESCE(TREE_DEPTH, 0) + 1 FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE WHERE UPPER(TRIM(TREE_CD)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) END, COALESCE( (SELECT old.SORT_ORDER FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE old WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(old.FUNCTION_CD, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(#{functionCd})) AND COALESCE(old.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'N' ORDER BY old.SORT_ORDER LIMIT 1), (SELECT MAX(SORT_ORDER) + 1 FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE WHERE COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') = COALESCE((CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL AND #{functionCd} LIKE 'FC%' THEN 'ROOT' ELSE #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} END), '#')), 1), CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN '/' || #{treeNm} || '/' ELSE (SELECT COALESCE(TREE_PATH, '/') || #{treeNm} || '/' FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE WHERE UPPER(TRIM(TREE_CD)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) END, 'Y'

INSERT INTO DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE (TREE_CD, FUNCTION_CD, UPPER_TREE_CD, TREE_NM, TREE_DEPTH, SORT_ORDER, TREE_PATH, USE_YN) SELECT #{treeCd}, #{functionCd}, CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL AND #{functionCd} LIKE 'FC%' THEN 'ROOT' ELSE #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} END, #{treeNm}, CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT COALESCE(TREE_DEPTH, 0) + 1 FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE WHERE UPPER(TRIM(TREE_CD)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) END, COALESCE( (SELECT old.SORT_ORDER FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE old WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(old.FUNCTION_CD, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(#{functionCd})) AND COALESCE(old.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'N' ORDER BY old.SORT_ORDER LIMIT 1), (SELECT MAX(SORT_ORDER) + 1 FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE WHERE COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') = COALESCE((CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL AND #{functionCd} LIKE 'FC%' THEN 'ROOT' ELSE #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} END), '#')), 1), CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN '/' || #{treeNm} || '/' ELSE (SELECT COALESCE(TREE_PATH, '/') || #{treeNm} || '/' FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE WHERE UPPER(TRIM(TREE_CD)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) END, 'Y'

INSERT INTO DOCS_SW_TREE (TREE_CD, FUNCTION_CD, UPPER_TREE_CD, TREE_NM, TREE_DEPTH, SORT_ORDER, TREE_PATH, USE_YN) SELECT #{treeCd}, #{functionCd}, CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN 'ROOT' ELSE #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} END, #{treeNm}, CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT COALESCE(TREE_DEPTH, 0) + 1 FROM DOCS_SW_TREE WHERE TREE_CD = #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) END, COALESCE( (SELECT old.SORT_ORDER FROM DOCS_SW_TREE old WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(old.FUNCTION_CD, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(#{functionCd})) AND COALESCE(old.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'N' ORDER BY old.SORT_ORDER LIMIT 1), (SELECT MAX(SORT_ORDER) + 1 FROM DOCS_SW_TREE WHERE COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') = COALESCE((CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN 'ROOT' ELSE #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} END), '#')), 1), CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN '/' || #{treeNm} || '/' ELSE (SELECT COALESCE(TREE_PATH, '/') || #{treeNm} || '/' FROM DOCS_SW_TREE WHERE TREE_CD = #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) END, 'Y'

INSERT INTO DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE (TREE_CD, FUNCTION_CD, UPPER_TREE_CD, TREE_NM, TREE_DEPTH, SORT_ORDER, TREE_PATH, USE_YN) SELECT #{treeCd}, #{functionCd}, CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN 'ROOT' ELSE #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} END, #{treeNm}, CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT COALESCE(TREE_DEPTH, 0) + 1 FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE WHERE TREE_CD = #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) END, COALESCE( (SELECT old.SORT_ORDER FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE old WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(old.FUNCTION_CD, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(#{functionCd})) AND COALESCE(old.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'N' ORDER BY old.SORT_ORDER LIMIT 1), (SELECT MAX(SORT_ORDER) + 1 FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE WHERE COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') = COALESCE((CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN 'ROOT' ELSE #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} END), '#')), 1), CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN '/' || #{treeNm} || '/' ELSE (SELECT COALESCE(TREE_PATH, '/') || #{treeNm} || '/' FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE WHERE TREE_CD = #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) END, 'Y'

INSERT INTO DOCS_DXF_TREE (TREE_CD, FUNCTION_CD, UPPER_TREE_CD, TREE_NM, TREE_DEPTH, SORT_ORDER, TREE_PATH, USE_YN) SELECT #{treeCd}, #{functionCd}, CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN 'ROOT' ELSE #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} END, #{treeNm}, CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT COALESCE(TREE_DEPTH, 0) + 1 FROM DOCS_DXF_TREE WHERE TREE_CD = #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) END, COALESCE( (SELECT old.SORT_ORDER FROM DOCS_DXF_TREE old WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(old.FUNCTION_CD, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(#{functionCd})) AND COALESCE(old.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'N' ORDER BY old.SORT_ORDER LIMIT 1), (SELECT MAX(SORT_ORDER) + 1 FROM DOCS_DXF_TREE WHERE COALESCE(UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') = COALESCE((CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN 'ROOT' ELSE #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} END), '#')), 1), CASE WHEN #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN '/' || #{treeNm} || '/' ELSE (SELECT COALESCE(TREE_PATH, '/') || #{treeNm} || '/' FROM DOCS_DXF_TREE WHERE TREE_CD = #{parentTreeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) END, 'Y'
UPDATE DOCS_DRAWING_TREE SET TREE_NM = #{treeNm} WHERE TREE_CD = #{treeCd}
UPDATE DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE SET TREE_NM = #{treeNm} WHERE TREE_CD = #{treeCd}
UPDATE DOCS_SW_TREE SET TREE_NM = #{treeNm} WHERE TREE_CD = #{treeCd}
UPDATE DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE SET TREE_NM = #{treeNm} WHERE TREE_CD = #{treeCd}
UPDATE DOCS_DXF_TREE SET TREE_NM = #{treeNm} WHERE TREE_CD = #{treeCd}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE WHERE UPPER_TREE_CD = #{value} AND COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE WHERE UPPER_TREE_CD = #{value} AND COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_SW_TREE WHERE UPPER_TREE_CD = #{value} AND COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE WHERE UPPER_TREE_CD = #{value} AND COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DXF_TREE WHERE UPPER_TREE_CD = #{value} AND COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DRAWING WHERE TREE_CD = #{value} AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT WHERE TREE_CD = #{value} AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_SW WHERE TREE_CD = #{value} AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT WHERE TREE_CD = #{value}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DXF_DOCUMENT WHERE TREE_CD = #{value}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE WHERE TREE_CD = #{value}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(#{value})) AND COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE WHERE TREE_CD = #{value}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(#{value})) AND COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_SW_TREE WHERE TREE_CD = #{value}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_SW_TREE WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(#{value})) AND COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE WHERE TREE_CD = #{value}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(#{value})) AND COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DXF_TREE WHERE TREE_CD = #{value}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DXF_TREE WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(FUNCTION_CD, ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(#{value})) AND COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT COALESCE(TREE_DEPTH, 0) FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE WHERE UPPER(TRIM(TREE_CD)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{value}))
SELECT TREE_CD FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE WHERE UPPER(TRIM(TREE_CD)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{value})) LIMIT 1
SELECT 'TRD' || LPAD( (COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(TREE_CD FROM '^TRD([0-9]+)$') AS INTEGER)), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 6, '0') FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE WHERE TREE_CD ~ '^TRD[0-9]+$'
SELECT 'TRB' || LPAD( (COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(TREE_CD FROM '^TRB([0-9]+)$') AS INTEGER)), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 6, '0') FROM DOCS_SW_TREE WHERE TREE_CD ~ '^TRB[0-9]+$'
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_DRAWING_TREE SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE TREE_CD = #{value}
UPDATE DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE TREE_CD = #{value}
UPDATE DOCS_SW_TREE SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE TREE_CD = #{value}
UPDATE DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE TREE_CD = #{value}
UPDATE DOCS_DXF_TREE SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE TREE_CD = #{value}
